title: Spicy Savory Russian Rice Flour Pancakes
description: A spicy and light Russian dish featuring rice flour pancakes, nimono-simmer, and low-fat-friendly ingredients, perfect for adventurous eaters. This recipe combines the flavors of Russia with a hint of spice and a low-fat twist.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together rice flour, eggs, milk, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper until smooth.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and brush with a small amount of oil.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter into the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip the pancake and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Repeat with the remaining batter, until all the pancakes are cooked.
In a small saucepan, combine 1 cup of water and 1 tablespoon of soy sauce, and bring to a simmer over low heat.
Add the chopped scallions to the saucepan and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they are slightly softened.
Serve the pancakes with the nimono-simmer sauce, smoked salmon, and a sprinkle of black pepper.
